Title: Abstract
Maine Lakes: Geographic & Morphometric I: This data set contains morphometric and geographical information for Maine lakes. Also included is the Maine Department of Environmental Protection (MDEP) trophic state assessment for each surveyed lake. Most data are from MDEP and Maine Department of Inland Fisheries & Wildlife (MDIFW) data files. Lake areas, perimeters and elevations were derived from GIS coverages. Some data are unavailable for some lakes. The data set also contains (a) a general statement about lake water quality; (b) status of documented infestations of invasive aquatic plants; and (c) fisheries management type.

Title: Depth_Max (feet)

Title: Volume (acrefeet)
Maine Lakes: Geographic & Morphometric I: Lake volume, in acre-feet

Title: Direct Drainage Area (sq miles)
Maine Lakes: Geographic & Morphometric I: Area of direct-drainage watershed, in square miles. The direct-drainage watershed is the land that drains directly into the lake and its tributaries; this excludes sections of the watershed that drain into upstream lakes.

Title: Total Drainage Area (sq miles)
Maine Lakes: Geographic & Morphometric I: Total drainage area of the lake, in square miles. This area includes sections of the watershed that drain into lakes and ponds upstream of the subject lake.

Title: Flushing Rate (times/yr)
Maine Lakes: Geographic & Morphometric I: Number of times that the water in the lake is (theoretically) replaced (by water inputs) during a year.

Title: Trophic Category
Maine Lakes: Geographic & Morphometric I: Trophic category: OLIGOtrophic (low productivity), MESOtrophic (moderate productivity), EUTROphic (high productivity)

Title: Dam
Maine Lakes: Geographic & Morphometric I: 1= no functional dam present; 2 = dam has increased lake surface area by >50% of undammed situtation; 3 = dam has increased lake area by <50% of undammed situtation.  Data from MDIFW Lake Survey file.

Title: Water Quality Statement
Maine Lakes: Geographic & Morphometric I: General (& brief) statement about the lake's water quality - based on DEP's assessment of multiple data parameters. Statement is not available for many lakes.

Title: Invasive Plant Infestation
Maine Lakes: Geographic & Morphometric I: Status of know infestations of invasive aquatic plants. Note that the status "none known" applies to lakes that (a) have been surveyed and no invasives documented, and (b) lake that  have not been surveyed. The majority of Maine lakes have not been surveyed as of 2011.

Title: Fishery Management
Maine Lakes: Geographic & Morphometric I: Fisheries management type. These data are from Maine Department of Inland Fisheries & Wildlife (obtained 2007).
